name: Supraterra
message: SupraterraWhat we areReal estate development group under the "land bank" scheme.We develop and conceptualize first-class residential and mixed-use projects, internationally recognized for their high degree of innovation and urban planning. We are the main land reserve provider for those developers who seek to make their real estate projects a success story, since by working together and generating synergy with their clients, they achieve a maximization of resources and an optimal positioning in the market.Geo: Mexico - Leak size: 1,1 TB Archive - Contains: Files, SQL
